title: polygonum aviculare subsp. aviculare
intro: Polygonum aviculare subsp. aviculare, also known as Knotweed or Persicaria, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the buckwheat family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and pain, and aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections. Polygonum aviculare subsp. aviculare is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
